# [clang] crashes when multiple [[clang::code_align]] attributes are applied to a loop

**Author:** k-arrows
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/188259
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** clang:frontend, confirmed, crash, generated by fuzzer
**Closed Date:** 2026-03-24T19:56:13Z

## Body

Reproducer:
https://godbolt.org/z/srn153GW7
```cpp
void bar(int);

void foo()
{
  [[clang::code_align(64)]]
  [[clang::code_align(1024ULL)]]
  for(int i=0; i<128; i++) { bar(i); }
}
```

Backtrace:
```console
clang++: /root/llvm-project/llvm/include/llvm/ADT/APSInt.h:182: bool llvm::APSInt::operator==(const llvm::APSInt&) const: Assertion `IsUnsigned == RHS.IsUnsigned && "Signedness mismatch!"' failed.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/ and include the crash backtrace, preprocessed source, and associated run script.
```

```cpp
void bar(int);

void foo()
{
  [[clang::code_align(64)]]

  for(int i=0; i&lt;128; i++) { bar(i); }
}
```
